Name: MAP_OBJECT_PARAM
Description: Defines core behavioral, animation, material, movement, navigation, and interaction settings for general map objects.

Fields.Name: Base Animation Speed
Fields.Description: Default playback speed multiplier for object animations.

Fields.Name: Animation Speed Override Rate
Fields.Description: Multiplier that overrides or modifies the base animation speed.

Fields.Name: Rapid Action Animation Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Speed multiplier applied during sudden or fast-opening actions.

Fields.Name: Material Type
Fields.Description: Defines the physical and visual material properties of the object.

Fields.Name: Movement Correction Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon used to adjust or correct object positioning during movement.

Fields.Name: Movement Type
Fields.Description: Defines how the object moves or behaves in motion.

Fields.Name: Weapon Storage Setting
Fields.Description: Defines whether or how weapons can be stored or attached to the object.

Fields.Name: Rotation Type
Fields.Description: Defines how the object rotates or pivots in the world.

Fields.Name: Time Act ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for time-based scripted behavior or animation sequences.

Fields.Name: Break Sound Volume
Fields.Description: Volume level of sound effects triggered when the object breaks.

Fields.Name: Navigation Control Type
Fields.Description: Defines how AI navigation interacts with or perceives this object.

Fields.Name: Enable Rapid Action Animation
Fields.Description: Allows the object to use accelerated animation during specific actions.

Fields.Name: Enable Decal Application
Fields.Description: Determines whether decals (e.g. blood, scorch marks) can be applied to this object.

Fields.Name: Unknown Field 1C
Fields.Description: Unidentified or unused parameter; purpose not yet determined.
